title: astragalus pinetorum subsp. multifoliatus
intro: Astragalus pinetorum subsp. multifoliatus, also known as the multifoliolate astragalus, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a popular herbal remedy. The health benefits of Astragalus pinetorum subsp. multifoliatus include reducing stress and fatigue, improving immune function, and enhancing cardiovascular health, among others. Astragalus pinetorum subsp. multifoliatus can be prepared as a tea, extract, or capsule, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
